'''Nuriin-Ar''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Korun/Legends|Korun]] terrorist who led a group of three other Korunnai and held six [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] civilians, including a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] and his aide and a member of the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|CSA]] [[Executive Directorship Board|Direx Board]] hostage for three hours. The plan was to get the [[Coruscant Security Force/Legends|Coruscant Security Force]] to burst in and accidentally kill the Direx Board member, thereby causing a huge political fallout between the CSA and the Republic, and possibly causing the well-armed [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]] to ally themselves with the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]].

The plan almost worked, but a squad of [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]], [[Omega Squad]], was sent into rescue the hostages instead of the CSF. During the twenty-second long fight Nuriin-Ar was killed almost instantly by a well-placed blaster round from [[Fi Skirata|one of the commandos]].
